full_text:
Liu Xiong 劉雄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xiong (劉雄)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Nominated as Filial and Incorrupt. Said to be descended from Emperor Jing of Han. Liu Xiong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
